topic: Your mouth bacteria predict heart disease risk
caption: Did you know your mouth bacteria can predict your heart disease risk? 🚨 Research shows a strong link between gum disease and cardiovascular health. 💔 Here are the facts: mouth bacteria can increase inflammation, which is a key factor in heart disease. 📊 Studies have found that people with gum disease are more likely to develop heart disease. 📈 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 🙏 #HeartHealth #MouthBacteria #GumDisease #CardiovascularHealth #Inflammation #OralHealthMatters #ScienceBacked
